title: PDF Certificates + Full-Text Search for aura-book

messages.content: Your task: 1) PDF Certificates - Read courses/views.py and find CertificateView. It generates certificates. Check if it generates actual PDFs or just data. If it doesn't generate PDFs, create a PDF generation utility. 2) Full-text search - Create a search endpoint.

Created 4 files/changes: 1) courses/pdf_utils.py - New PDF generation utility using reportlab with dark theme (A4 landscape, professional certificate design). 2) courses/search.py - Full-text search across courses and products using Django Q objects. 3) Updated CertificateView.generate() to support ?format=pdf query param for PDF download. 4) Added global_search_view + search URL endpoint.

decisions: Reportlab for PDF generation (lighter than WeasyPrint)
format=pdf query param instead of separate POST endpoint
Used CourseListSerializer + ProductListSerializer for search results
Fixed Product model field: title (not name) per shop/models.py
